title: New status label bug
excerpt: Currently, when creating a new status label using the label indexes, they label disappears after a refresh or a navigation to another board and back to the original board. Only the labels that are created manually on the…

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, when creating a new status label using the label indexes, they label disappears after a refresh or a navigation to another board and back to the original board. Only the labels that are created manually on the board remain. The rest just disappears.
Here is a video showing the above described problem.

posts.author: Marc1 (Marc Rosser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kolaii,

I recommend you get in touch with Support about this.

regards,

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kolaai,

I agree with @Marc1, I think that you should perhaps direct your question to appsupport@monday.com!

Same with your previous post, do you mind letting me know:

  • When was the last time you saw this issue occur (exact time and timezone)?
  • What is the URL of the board/item where this issue occurred?
  • Are you seeing any error messages in your logs?

Thanks!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
